text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 32 

BENE_RSDNC_SSA_STATE_CD 

LABEL: SSA standard state code of the beneficiary’s residence 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the two-digit Social Security Administration (SSA) code for the state identified as the 
beneficiary mailing address. 

SHORT NAME: STATE_CD 

LONG NAME: BENE_RSDNC_SSA_STATE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: 01 = Alabama 
02 = Alaska 
03 = Arizona 
04 =
